Flare Barbs.name: 耀焰倒刺 Flare Barbs
Flare Barbs.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 一个位于你触及内的生物以一次打击成功命中你。

你竖起倒刺，刺穿你的攻击者。触发生物受到 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2)d8)[piercing]] 伤害，并且必须进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] 豁免，其目标DC为你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。在大失败时，该生物还会受到 @Damage[(1d4+ceil(@actor.level/2) -1)[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。在3级以及此后每2个等级，此伤害增加1d8，且持续流血伤害增加1，至19级时最多为10d8穿刺伤害与1d4+9持续流血伤害。

Frequency once per day

Trigger A creature within your reach successfully hits you with a Strike.

You flare your barbs, piercing your attacker. The triggering creature takes @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2)d8)[piercing]] damage with a @Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a critical failure, the creature also takes @Damage[(1d4+ceil(@actor.level/2) -1)[persistent,bleed]] damage. At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, this damage increases by 1d8 and the persistent bleed damage increases by 1, to a maximum of 10d8 piercing damage and 1d4+9 persistent bleed damage at 19th level .

Creeping Crawlers.name: 潜行爬虫 Creeping Crawlers
Creeping Crawlers.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发 一个敌人带有敌意地接触你，例如通过擒抱你、以近战徒手攻击成功命中你，或对你使用射程为接触的法术

效果 你巢群中的爬行生物本能地从你的身体中滑出，扭动着爬满那胆敢攻击你的敌人。触发的敌人必须尝试进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，DC为你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。若失败，其将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}；若大失败，则改为陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger A foe touches you with hostile intent, such as by Grappling you, successfully hitting you with a melee unarmed attack, or using a spell with a range of touch against you

Effect The crawling creatures of your brood instinctively slither from your body to wriggle all over the foe who dared to attack you. The triggering foe must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}, and on a critical failure they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} instead.

Envenom Bite.name: 毒液撕咬 Envenom Bite
Envenom Bite.description:
频率 每天次数等于你的等级

效果 你用毒液浸染你的獠牙。若你在本回合结束前进行的下一次獠牙打击命中并造成伤害，则该打击额外造成 1d6 点毒素伤害。在大成功或大失败时，毒素照常被浪费。至第10等级时，此毒素伤害提升为 2d6；至第18等级时，此毒素伤害提升为 3d6。

Frequency A number of times per day equal to your level

Effect You envenom your fangs. If the next fangs Strike you make before the end of your turn hits and deals damage, the Strike deals an additional 1d6 poison damage. On a critical failure, the poison is wasted as normal. At 10th level, this poison damage increases to 2d6, and at 18th level, the poison damage increases to 3d6.

Wreathe in Flames.name: 烈焰缠身 Wreathe in Flames
Wreathe in Flames.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 你正持用一把武器

你将积压的情绪一股脑倾泻而出，让由你显化的怒火化作火焰缠绕你的武器。直到你的回合结束，你当前持用的一把武器被火焰缠绕，并且你用该武器造成的每个武器伤害骰额外造成1d4火焰伤害。

Frequency once per day

Requirements You are wielding a weapon

You unleash your pent-up emotions all at once, wreathing your weapon in flames formed out of your manifested fury. Until the end of your turn, one weapon you’re currently wielding is wreathed in flame, and you deal an additional 1d4 fire damage per weapon damage die with that weapon.

Inject Venom.name: 注入毒液 Inject Venom
Inject Venom.description:
频率 每小时一次

需求 你上一个动作是一次成功的用尾巴进行的近战打击，并造成穿刺伤害

效果 你向目标注入弱化的奥西鲁斯毒液。目标必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，其DC等于你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到 @Damage[1d4[poison]] 伤害。

失败 目标在阶段 1 感染弱化的奥西鲁斯毒液。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但毒药从阶段 2 开始。

弱化的奥西鲁斯毒液（毒素）

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d4[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[2d4[poison]] 伤害，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}（1 轮）

Frequency once per hour

Requirements Your last action was a successful melee Strike with your tail that dealt piercing damage

Effect You inject weakened osyluth venom into the target. The target must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] save, with a DC equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage.

Failure The target becomes afflicted with weakened osyluth venom at Stage 1.

Critical Failure Same as failure but the poison starts at Stage 2.

Weakened Osyluth Venom (poison)

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d4[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[2d4[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Swarm's Release.name: 虫群释放 Swarm's Release
Swarm's Release.description:
触发 你在你的回合开始时处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60] 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]

效果 你的育群在皮肤下搏动，推动着挣脱你身体庇护所所拒绝的自由。随着你的虫群从你的体孔中破出，使你如今空荡的形体被抬起或扭转，你起立或尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}。在你花费一个交互动作将你的育群重新收回体内之前，你不能使用具有 swarmblood 特征的动作。

Trigger you begin your turn @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60], or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]

Effect Your brood pulses beneath your skin, pushing for a freedom denied by the refuge of your body. You Stand or attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} as your swarm breaks free from your orifices, lifting or twisting your now-empty form. You cannot use actions with the swarmblood trait until you spend an Interact action to draw your brood back into your body.

Draft Contract.name: 合同草案 Draft Contract
Draft Contract.description:
你在短短片刻内起草出一份契约，将已达成交易的每个部分都落实在纸面上，然后将这份契约递交给预定签署者。契约会出现在该生物手中；若其没有空闲的手，则会悬浮在其面前；并且他们可以立即使用一个反应动作（）来签署契约。不过，如果他们够明智，就会花更长时间仔细阅读其中的细则。若你或签署者任一方违背契约，你在接下来 1 周内对另一方进行的所有检定和 DC 都会受到 –1 状态减值。

You draft up a contract in mere moments, committing every part of an agreed-upon deal to the page, then offer this contract to the intended signatory. The contract appears in that creature's hands, or hovering in front of them if they have no free hands, and they can immediately use a reaction to sign the contract. However, if they're wise, they'll spend longer than that to carefully read the fine print. If either you or the signatory violates the contract, you take a –1 status penalty to all checks and DCs against the other for 1 week.

Change Shape (Werecreature).name: 改变形态（狼人类） Change Shape (Werecreature)
Change Shape (Werecreature).description:
你强调自身存在的不同性相，并在你的类人形态、混合形态与动物形态之间切换。就揭示你“真实形态”的效果而言，你的真实形态是在创建你的角色时从三种形态中选择的任意一种；在游戏过程中，一段格外强烈的经历可能会在GM的裁量下使你改变你的真实形态。

You emphasize a different aspect of your being and shift between your humanoid form, hybrid form, and animal form. For the purpose of effects that reveal your "true form," your true form is whichever of the three forms you choose when creating your character; during play, a particularly intense experience might cause you to change your true form at the GM's discretion.

Infuse Weapon.name: 灌注武器 Infuse Weapon
Infuse Weapon.description:
频率 每日一次

需求 你正持用一把武器

效果 你将自身灵魂精粹的一缕碎片灌注入你的武器。持续1分钟，你当前持用的武器变为魔法武器，并暂时转化为下列特殊材料之一：银或冷铁。在11级时，将精金和桃木加入你可选择的特殊材料列表。

Frequency once per day

Requirements You are wielding a weapon

Effect You infuse your weapon with a fragment of your own spiritual essence. For 1 minute, the weapon you’re currently wielding becomes magical and temporarily transforms into one of the following special materials: silver or cold iron. At 11th level, add adamantine and peachwood to the list of special materials you can select.

Recenter.name: 重新居中 Recenter
Recenter.description:
需求 你处于一次遭遇中

效果 你重新集中精神，并根据你的心智训练将注意力聚焦于五种认知性相之一。类似于一种精神架势，此“重新集中”状态会持续到你被击败、直到遭遇结束、直到你使用一个会消耗你“重新集中”状态的能力、或直到你再次重新集中为止，以最先发生者为准。你只能在一次遭遇中进入并保持“重新集中”状态。你可以解除你的“重新集中”状态。五种性相各自与一项技能或察觉相关联。这五种性相为：愤怒（恐吓）、共情（交涉）、诡计（欺瞒）、洞见（察觉）与理性（神秘学）。当你以某个性相重新集中时，你在使用相关技能进行检定时获得+1状态加值（若你以洞见重新集中，则为察觉）。若你在相关技能上为传奇（若你以洞见重新集中，则为察觉），你改为获得+2状态加值。

Requirements You're in an encounter

Effect You recenter your mind and focus on one of five cognitive aspects, depending upon your mental training. Akin to a mental stance, this Recentered state lasts until you're knocked out, until the encounter ends, until you use an ability that expends your Recentered state, or until you Recenter again, whichever comes first. You can become and remain Recentered only in an encounter. You can Dismiss your Recentered state. Each of the five aspects is associated either with a skill or with Perception. The five aspects are anger (Intimidation), empathy (Diplomacy), guile (Deception), insight (Perception), and reason (Occultism). While Recentered to an aspect, you gain a +1 status bonus to checks using the associated skill (or Perception if you're Recentered to insight). If you're legendary in the associated skill (or Perception if you're Recentered to insight), you gain a +2 status bonus instead.

Feed.name: 进食 Feed
Feed.description:
需求 一个位于你的触及内的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} 或自愿的生物

你将獠牙刺入该生物并饮其血，或咬下几口其血肉。若受害者处于 grabbed，则你必须进行一次 @Check[type:athletics|defense:fortitude] 检定，对抗受害者的 Fortitude DC；若受害者处于其他任一状态，则自动成功。若你成功，该生物变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失（状态） 1}，且你在 1 小时内得到满足。该生物在 1 天内对你的 Feed 暂时免疫，且当目标已处于流失（状态）时，对其进一步使用不会提高流失（状态），也不会使你得到满足。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.IiaUgC8i8BgxfXh5]{效果：满足}

Requirements A @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, or willing creature is within your reach

You sink your fangs into that creature and drink its blood or take a few bites of its flesh. This requires an @Check[type:athletics|defense:fortitude] check against the victim's Fortitude DC if the victim is grabbed, and automatically succeeds for any of the other conditions. If you succeed, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}, and you are satisfied for 1 hour. The creature is temporarily immune to your Feed for 1 day, and further uses against the target while it's already drained don't increase the drained condition and don't satisfy you.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.IiaUgC8i8BgxfXh5]{Effect: Satisfied}

Scheming Trick.name: 阴谋诡计 Scheming Trick
Scheming Trick.description:
触发 你察觉到的60尺内的一名敌人尝试对你进行一次攻击掷骰

效果 你使出一个巧妙的花招来干扰敌人对你的攻击。描述你如何愚弄敌人，并进行一次 @Check[deception|against:perception] 检定，对抗其察觉DC，结果取决于你的结果。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.yZSKa4IJAsmOoAC2]{效果：谋划诡计}

大成功 你的花招彻底愚弄了敌人。他们在此次触发的攻击掷骰上承受–4环境减值，并且在你下个回合结束前对你进行的任何其他攻击掷骰也承受该减值。

成功 你的花招足以误导敌人，为你创造闪避的空隙。他们在此次触发的攻击掷骰上承受–2环境减值，并且在你下个回合结束前对你进行的任何其他攻击掷骰也承受该减值。

失败 敌人看穿了你的花招，但在他们看穿所需的瞬间里，你找到了一丝空隙。触发的敌人在此次触发的攻击掷骰上承受–1环境减值。

大失败 敌人比你领先两步，因此你的花招完全无效。

Trigger A foe you're aware of within 60 feet attempts an attack roll against you

Effect You pull a clever trick to interfere with your foe's attacks against you. Describe how you fooled the foe and roll a @Check[deception|against:perception] check against their Perception DC, with results depending on your result.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.yZSKa4IJAsmOoAC2]{Effect: Scheming Trick}

Critical Success Your trick completely fools your foe. They take a –4 circumstance penalty on the triggering attack roll, as well as any other attack rolls against you until the end of your next turn.

Success Your trick misleads your foe enough to create an opening for you to dodge. They take a –2 circumstance penalty on the triggering attack roll, as well as any other attack rolls against you until the end of your next turn.

Failure Your foe sees through your trick, but in the instant it takes them to do so, you find a slight opening. The triggering foe takes a –1 circumstance penalty on the triggering attack roll.

Critical Failure Your foe is two steps ahead of you, so your trick is completely ineffective.

Capture Life's Last Gasp.name: 捕捉生命的最后喘息 Capture Life's Last Gasp
Capture Life's Last Gasp.description:
频率 每日一次

需求 你正持用一把武器

效果 你向一名在上一轮内死亡的生物的尸体，或向一处在上一轮内被摧毁的祟灵或无形不死生物的所在之处挥舞你的武器，将其逐渐消逝的生命精华与一缕灵魂碎片吸入你的武器中。这股能量在你的武器内保留1小时，或直到你以具有专注（特征）的双行动行动将其以魔法转移至炼狱为止。

当能量在你的武器内时，武器会发光，如同火炬一般散发光亮；此光亮具有神圣、塑能与光亮（特征）特征。当你将武器内的生命精华与灵魂碎片转移至炼狱时，你的武器迸发光芒，对所有相邻生物造成1d6伤害（@Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic] 使用你的职业DC或法术DC进行基础豁免，取较高者）。此效果对不死生物造成 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[vitality]]{vitality} 伤害，对活物造成 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[void]]{void} 伤害。既非活物也非不死生物的生物（如构装体）不会受到该伤害。在3级时，且此后每提升2个等级，该伤害增加1d6。

Frequency once per day

Requirements You are wielding a weapon

Effect You brandish your weapon at the corpse of a creature who died within the last round or at the site where a haunt or incorporeal undead was destroyed within the last round, drawing their ebbing vital essence and a fragment of their spirit into your weapon. This energy remains within your weapon for 1 hour, or until you magically transfer it to Purgatory as a two-action activity that has the concentrate trait.

While the energy is within your weapon, the weapon glows, shedding light as a torch; this light has the divine, evocation, and light traits. When you transfer the vital essence and spirit fragment within your weapon to Purgatory, your weapon flares with light, dealing 1d6 damage to all adjacent creatures (@Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic] save using your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher). This deals @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[vitality]]{vitality} damage to undead creatures and @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[void]]{void} damage to living creatures. Creatures that are neither living nor undead, such as constructs, are unharmed by this damage. At 3rd level, and every 2 levels thereafter, this damage increases by 1d6.

Jump Scare.name: 惊吓跳跃 Jump Scare
Jump Scare.description:
需求 你未处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}

触发 一个你对其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}、未侦测或未注意的敌人进入你10尺内的一个空间

效果 你从藏身处跃出并咆哮，同时摆出骇人的表情。你可以朝触发生物方向 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap} 至多10尺。无论你是否Leap，你都会对该生物暴露自身，不再处于Hidden、未侦测或未注意，并进行一次威吓检定以使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} 触发生物，使用“威吓怒视”以加入视觉（特征）而非听觉（特征）；你在这次威吓检定中获得+2环境加值。

Requirements You aren't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}

Trigger A foe to which you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, undetected, or unnoticed enters a space within 10 feet of you

Effect You leap from hiding and snarl, while adopting a terrifying expression. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap} up to 10 feet toward the triggering creature. Whether or not you Leap, you reveal yourself to the creature and are no longer hidden, undetected, or unnoticed, and you attempt an Intimidation check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} the triggering creature using Intimidating Glare to add the visual trait instead of the auditory trait; you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to this Intimidation check.

Wrath's Retribution.name: 愤怒的报应 Wrath's Retribution
Wrath's Retribution.description:
触发 你120尺内的一名敌人对你造成伤害

需求 你已将重新归心设定为愤怒

效果 当你的敌人胆敢伤害你时，你的愤怒更为汹涌，并以精神反击猛然回击。触发的敌人每当你拥有两个等级便受到1d6点精神伤害（@Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2)d6)[mental]]，在20级时最多10d6），并以你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者为基准进行一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell|basic] 豁免。你消耗你的重新归心状态。

Trigger A foe within 120 feet of you damages you

Requirements You're Recentered to anger

Effect When your foe dares to harm you, your anger surges stronger and lashes out with a mental counterattack. The triggering foe takes 1d6 mental damage for every two levels you have (@Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2)d6)[mental]], maximum 10d6 at 20th level) with a @Check[will|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. You expend your Recentered state.

Insight Shield.name: 洞悉护盾 Insight Shield
Insight Shield.description:
触发 你将因一次攻击、法术或效果而受到伤害

需求 你已再定心至洞见

效果 你以洞见之盾保护自己。你获得对所有伤害的抗力，其数值等于你的等级，以对抗触发的效果。你消耗你的再定心状态。

Trigger You would take damage from an attack, spell, or effect

Requirements You're Recentered to insight

Effect You protect yourself with a shield of insight. You gain resistance to all damage equal to your level against the triggering effect. You expend your Recentered state.

Blasphemous Denial.name: 亵渎否认 Blasphemous Denial
Blasphemous Denial.description:
触发 你尝试对抗一个神圣魔法效果进行一次豁免掷骰，但你尚未掷该豁免掷骰。

效果 敌人的魔法在你身上的亵渎印记前反噬。你在该触发的豁免掷骰上获得+2环境加值。此外，若该触发的魔法来自与所选神祇有关联的来源（例如其信仰的牧师或神圣使者），则当你对抗该魔法效果的豁免掷骰结果为成功时，你改为获得大成功。

Trigger You attempt a saving throw against a divine magical effect, but you haven't rolled the saving throw yet.

Effect The enemy magic recoils against the blasphemous marks on your body. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to the triggering saving throw. Additionally, if the triggering magic came from a source affiliated with the chosen deity (such as a cleric of their faith or a divine herald), then if you roll a success on the saving throw against that magical effect, you get a critical success instead.

Ensnare.name: 诱捕 Ensnare
Ensnare.description:
需求 你上一个动作是用你的丝绳进行的一次成功打击

效果 你的一缕头发从你的丝绳上撕裂脱落，并缠绕在该生物身上，使该生物的所有速度承受–10英尺减值，持续至多1分钟。从这缕头发的缠绕中@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}的DC等于你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。当某个生物通过逃脱摆脱此效果时，脱落的那缕头发会魔法般地剥落并重新融入你的丝绳。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.NIaiI64ywPaKEvPd]{效果：缠绕}

Requirements Your last action was a successful Strike with your silken rope

Effect A coil of your hair tears loose from your silken rope and wraps itself around the creature, imposing a –10-foot penalty to the creature's Speeds for up to 1 minute. The DC to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} from the coil of hair is equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC. When a creature Escapes this effect, the detached coil of your hair magically sloughs off and reintegrates with your silken rope.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.NIaiI64ywPaKEvPd]{Effect: Ensnare}

Undersign Embedded Clause.name: 下划线嵌入从句 Undersign Embedded Clause
Undersign Embedded Clause.description:
频率 每小时一次

需求 你已与一名契约相对方起草了一份契约，且该相对方在60尺内

效果 你用手指或书写工具或其他持握的物体，在你的某份契约中对一条嵌入条款进行签署确认；你在空中签字，但将签名转移到契约上，并在相对方位于60尺内期间赋予其一项魔法恩赐。若该契约的相对方使用其反应动作来表示同意并对该嵌入条款签署确认，则其获得以下由你选择、并由契约条款预先决定的一项益处。若这使其获得状态加值，你也获得同样的加值，但持续时间为其两倍。若这使其回复生命值，你回复其两倍的生命值。

  • 其获得AC +1状态加值，持续2轮。
  • 其在攻击掷骰与伤害掷骰上获得+1状态加值，持续2轮。
  • 其回复等同于其等级数量的生命值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.I59pOoCEBCBgBxXz]{效果：副署嵌入条款（自身）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.rsEIpk5uItOp5YAA]{效果：副署嵌入条款（相对方）}

Frequency once per hour

Requirements You have Drafted a Contract with a counterparty, and that counterparty is within 60 feet

Effect You use your finger or a writing implement or other held object to sign off on an embedded clause within one of your contracts, signing on the air but transferring the signature to the contract and granting the contract's counterparty a magical boon as long as they are within 60 feet. If the counterparty to the contract uses their reaction to assent and sign off on the embedded clause, they gain one of the following benefits of your choice, as predetermined by the terms of the contract. If this causes them to gain a status bonus, you gain the same bonus, but it lasts for twice as long. If this causes them to regain Hit Points, you regain twice as many Hit Points as they did.

  • They gain a +1 status bonus to AC for 2 rounds.
  • They gain a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls for 2 rounds.
  • They regain a number of Hit Points equal to their level.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.I59pOoCEBCBgBxXz]{Effect: Undersign Embedded Clause (Self)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.rsEIpk5uItOp5YAA]{Effect: Undersign Embedded Clause (Counterparty)}

Pang of Empathy.name: 共情之痛 Pang of Empathy
Pang of Empathy.description:
触发 一名敌人以一次攻击或法术对你造成伤害

需求 你已将再定心设定为共情

效果 你通过共情所形成的连结拨动敌人的心弦，使其涌起悔意的刺痛，令其继续战斗的热情变得迟钝。其效果取决于敌人的意志豁免。你消耗你的再定心状态。

大成功或大失败 敌人甩开这阵刺痛，不受影响。

成功 敌人因情绪挣扎而在一段时间内无法充分发挥类似攻击的威力。若触发的伤害来自基于力量的攻击，则敌人在其下个回合结束前成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}；若来自基于敏捷的攻击，则敌人在其下个回合结束前成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}；若来自法术，则敌人在其下个回合结束前成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}。

失败 同成功，但情绪的刺痛持续更久。敌人根据触发伤害的来源，在3轮内陷入 enfeebled 2、clumsy 2 或 stupefied 2。

大成功或大失败 同成功，但共情的感受起初更为强烈，且萦绕更久。敌人根据触发伤害的来源，在其下个回合结束前成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 4}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 4} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}，随后在1分钟内陷入 enfeebled 2、clumsy 2 或 stupefied 2。该状态取决于触发伤害的来源。

Trigger A foe deals damage to you with an attack or spell

Requirements You're Recentered to empathy

Effect You pluck the heartstrings of your foe through the connection formed by your empathy, causing them pangs of regret that dull their ardor to continue. The effects depend on the foe's Will saving throw. You expend your Recentered state.

Critical Success The foe shakes off the pangs and is unaffected.

Success The foe is unable to make the most of similar attacks for a while as they struggle with their emotions. If the triggering damage came from a Strength-based attack, the foe becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} until the end of their next turn, if it came from a Dexterity-based attack, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} until the end of their next turn, and if it came from a spell, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} until the end of their next turn.

Failure As success but the emotional pangs are longer-lasting. The foe is enfeebled 2, clumsy 2, or stupefied 2 for 3 rounds, depending on the source of the triggering damage.

Critical Failure As success but the feelings of empathy are acute at first and linger even longer. The foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 4}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 4}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4} until the end of their next turn and then enfeebled 2, clumsy 2, or stupefied 2 for 1 minute. The condition depends on the source of the triggering damage.

Throw Lightning.name: 投掷闪电 Throw Lightning
Throw Lightning.description:
你将体内残留的电荷引导成一道有形的闪电矢，然后将其作为一次远程打击投掷出去。这道闪电矢是一种远程徒手攻击，射程增量为60尺，造成1d6电击伤害，并具有投掷特征。你使用“投掷闪电”对具有金（特征）的生物或穿着金属护甲的生物进行攻击掷骰时，获得+2环境加值。在你投掷这道闪电后，你从“吸收闪电”获得的任何电击抗力会立刻结束。

在3级时，你使用“投掷闪电”进行的攻击掷骰获得+1物品加值，且你用“投掷闪电”造成的伤害增加1d6。在11级时，物品加值提高至+2，且你造成的伤害再增加1d6；在17级时，物品加值提高至+3，且伤害再增加1d6。这些额外的伤害骰为武器伤害骰，因此它们不会与强袭符文累加。

You channel the lingering electric charge in your body into a tangible bolt of lightning, then throw it as a ranged Strike. This bolt of lightning is a ranged unarmed attack with a range increment of 60 feet that deals 1d6 electricity damage and has the thrown trait. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to attack rolls with Throw Lightning against creatures with the metal trait or creatures wearing metal armor. After throwing this lightning, any electricity resistance you gained from Absorb Lightning immediately ends.

At 3rd level, you gain a +1 item bonus to your attack rolls with Throw Lightning and the damage you deal with Throw Lightning increases by 1d6. At 11th level, the item bonus increases to +2 and the damage you deal increases by another 1d6, and at 17th level, the item bonus increases to +3 and the damage increases by another 1d6. These extra damage dice are weapon damage dice, and so they aren't cumulative with striking runes.

Mental Shield.name: 精神护盾 Mental Shield
Mental Shield.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你在对抗一个精神效果的豁免检定中掷骰获得成功

效果 你强化心智以彻底摆脱该效果。你在该次豁免检定中获得大成功而非成功。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll a success on a saving throw against a mental effect

Effect You bolster your mind to throw off the effect entirely. You get a critical success on the saving throw instead of a success.

Enmesh Will.name: 纠缠 意志 Enmesh Will
Enmesh Will.description:
触发 你尝试一次意志豁免

需求 你处于以理性为中心的再定心状态

效果 你将意志深深织入你的理性迷宫之中。你在触发的意志豁免上获得+2状态加值；若该触发的意志豁免是对抗情绪效果，则获得+4状态加值。你消耗你的再定心状态。

Trigger You attempt a Will save

Requirements You're Recentered to reason

Effect You enmesh your will deep within your labyrinth of rationality. You gain a +2 status bonus on the triggering Will save, or a +4 status bonus if the triggering Will save was against an emotion effect. You expend your Recentered state.

Guileful Phantasm.name: 狡诈幻影 Guileful Phantasm
Guileful Phantasm.description:
触发 一个敌人试图以一次攻击或其他定向效果将你作为目标

需求 你已以诡计为重心

效果 你用巧妙选取的幻象分散敌人的注意力，并干扰其将你作为目标的尝试。直到该触发敌人的下个回合结束前，你对该触发敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。你消耗你的重心状态。

Trigger A foe attempts to target you with an attack or other targeted effect

Requirements You're Recentered to guile

Effect You distract your foe with cleverly chosen phantasms and interfere with their attempts to target you. You become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to the triggering foe until the end of that foe's next turn. You expend your Recentered state.
